latin: Cum Marcus Polus de Sinis redisset, amici ei non crediderunt. 'chartam pecuniariam habent!' dixit. 'et viae igni nigro illuminantur!' in lecto mortis rogaverunt num mentitus esset. 'dimidium nondum narravi,' respondit.

questions.prompt: What amazing things did Marco Polo report?
questions.target: Paper money and roads lit by coal
choices: Paper money and roads lit by coal

questions.prompt: What were his last words on his deathbed?
questions.target: I have not yet told half of it
choices: I have not yet told half of it

translation: When Marco Polo returned from China, his friends did not believe him. 'They have paper money!' he said. 'And roads are lit by black fire!' On his deathbed they asked if he had lied. 'I have not yet told half of it,' he replied.
